name: Adidas Originals Handball Spezial Leather – Burgundy/Teal
description: A classic indoor trainer reimagined for everyday streetwear. The Handball Spezial features a premium leather upper with contrast 3-Stripes, a cushioned insole for all-day comfort, and a durable gum rubber outsole for grip and style. Finished in a rich burgundy with vintage-inspired detailing, it’s a timeless staple that pairs effortlessly with denim or relaxed tailoring.
warranty_description: 12-month warranty covering manufacturing defects. Excludes normal wear and tear, misuse, and accidental damage.

name: Adidas Originals Floral Trefoil Back Print Tee – Charcoal
description: Refresh your everyday staples with a bold Adidas Originals statement. This tee is made from soft cotton jersey for all-day comfort and features a clean front with an oversized floral Trefoil graphic on the back. A relaxed fit and classic ribbed crewneck finish the look—perfect for streetwear styling or casual layering.
warranty_description: Covered by a 6-month warranty against manufacturing defects in fabric, stitching, and print quality under normal wear. Warranty excludes fading due to washing, shrinkage from improper care, general wear and tear, and accidental damage. Proof of purchase is required for any warranty claim.

name: Adidas UltraBOOST 4.0 Knit – Maroon/Multi
description: Built for comfort over every mile, the UltraBOOST 4.0 features a breathable Primeknit upper that adapts to your stride and delivers a snug, sock-like fit. A responsive Boost midsole returns energy with every step, while the durable rubber outsole offers reliable traction on city streets. Finished in a rich burgundy knit pattern, it blends performance tech with everyday style.
warranty_description: This product includes a 12-month manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship under normal running and casual use. The warranty does not cover damage from excessive wear, improper sizing, misuse, exposure to harsh chemicals, or modifications. Proof of purchase is required for warranty service and product assessment may be needed.

name: Adidas Originals Firebird Track Pants – Burgundy
description: A timeless Adidas Originals essential, the Firebird Track Pants bring heritage style to everyday wear. Made from smooth recycled polyester tricot with a relaxed fit, they feature iconic 3-Stripes down the legs and a Trefoil logo for a classic finish. Side zip pockets keep essentials secure, while an adjustable drawcord waist offers all-day comfort. Perfect for streetwear styling or off-duty lounging.
warranty_description: Covered by a 6-month warranty against manufacturing defects in fabric, stitching, zippers, and logo application under normal wear. Warranty excludes damage caused by improper washing, fading, shrinkage, snags, or general wear and tear. Proof of purchase is required for all warranty claims.

description: Designed for comfort on the move, these Adidas tapered joggers blend a soft fleece feel with a flattering, modern fit. warranty_description: This product includes a 6-month warranty against manufacturing defects in fabric, stitching, zippers, and logo print under normal use. The warranty does not cover shrinkage, fading due to washing, abrasion, stains, or general wear and tear. Proof of purchase is required for warranty claims.

name: Organic Turmeric Root Powder
description: Premium organic turmeric (Curcuma longa) root powder. Known for powerful anti-inflammatory properties due to curcumin content. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for joint health and overall wellness. Add to smoothies, teas, or golden milk recipes. Non-GMO, gluten-free, and sustainably sourced.
warranty_description: Store in cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Seal tightly after opening.

name: Echinacea Immune Support Capsules
description: Standardized Echinacea purpurea extract capsules for immune system support. Contains 400mg per capsule with 4% echinacosides. Traditionally used to reduce duration and severity of colds. Third-party tested for purity and potency. Vegan, non-GMO, gluten-free.
warranty_description: Store in cool, dry place. Keep out of reach of children.

name: Ashwagandha Root Powder - KSM-66

warranty_description: Keep sealed. Refrigeration extends freshness. Avoid moisture.

name: Milk Thistle Liver Support
description: Milk Thistle (Silybum marianum) seed extract standardized to 80% silymarin. Supports liver health and detoxification. 175mg silymarin per capsule. Non-GMO, gluten-free. Ideal for liver cleansing protocols. Third-party tested for quality and purity.
warranty_description: Store away from heat and moisture. Do not use if seal is broken.

name: Ginkgo Biloba Memory Support
description: Ginkgo biloba leaf extract standardized to 24% flavone glycosides and 6% terpene lactones. Supports cognitive function, memory, and circulation. 120mg per capsule. Vegan, non-GMO. Clinically studied dosage for optimal brain health support.
warranty_description: Keep bottle tightly closed. Store in cool, dry place.

name: Organic Peppermint Leaf Tea
description: Premium organic peppermint (Mentha piperita) leaves for refreshing herbal tea. Supports digestive comfort, freshens breath, and provides natural energy. Caffeine-free. Perfect hot or iced. Vibrant, minty flavor. Steep 5-7 minutes in boiling water.
warranty_description: Reseal after use. Keep away from strong odors and moisture.
